is a Gabonese [airline](/wiki/Airline "Airline") operating scheduled service to a number of airports throughout [Cameroon](/wiki/Cameroon "Cameroon"), [Gabon](/wiki/Gabon "Gabon"), and [São Tomé](/wiki/S%C3%A3o_Tom%C3%A9 "São Tomé"), as well as the [Republic of the Congo](/wiki/Republic_of_the_Congo "Republic of the Congo").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Gabonese airline

For the defunct Nigerian airline, see [Afrijet Airlines](/wiki/Afrijet_Airlines "Afrijet Airlines").

Afrijet Business Service

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| | [IATA](/wiki/Airline_codes#IATA_airline_designator "Airline codes") | [ICAO](/wiki/Airline_codes#ICAO_airline_designator "Airline codes") | [Call sign](/wiki/Aviation_call_signs#Commercial_airline "Aviation call signs") | | --- | --- | --- | | J7 | ABS | AFRIJET | | |
| Founded | 2004 |
| [Hubs](/wiki/Airline_hub "Airline hub") | [Léon-Mba International Airport](/wiki/L%C3%A9on-Mba_International_Airport "Léon-Mba International Airport") |
| [Frequent-flyer program](/wiki/Frequent-flyer_program "Frequent-flyer program") | Le CLUB |
| Fleet size | 8 |
| Destinations | 12 |
| Headquarters | [Libreville](/wiki/Libreville "Libreville"), Gabon |
| Website | [flyafrijet.online/en](https://flyafrijet.online/en) |

**Afrijet Business Service** is a Gabonese [airline](/wiki/Airline "Airline") operating scheduled service to a number of airports throughout [Cameroon](/wiki/Cameroon "Cameroon"), [Gabon](/wiki/Gabon "Gabon"), and [São Tomé](/wiki/S%C3%A3o_Tom%C3%A9 "São Tomé"), as well as the [Republic of the Congo](/wiki/Republic_of_the_Congo "Republic of the Congo").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=AfriJet&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

Afrijet was founded in 2004 by a group of private investors, initially flying private charters using [Falcon 900](/wiki/Dassault_Falcon_900 "Dassault Falcon 900") aircraft. In 2016, Afrijet commenced scheduled domestic flights throughout Gabon, and have since expanded to neighboring countries.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

On 9 December 2021, AfriJet announced it had partnered with [La Compagnie](/wiki/La_Compagnie "La Compagnie") to launch seasonal flights between Paris Orly and Libreville's Léon-Mba International Airport from 16 December 2021 [[3]](#cite_note-3)

AfriJet is looking towards the future of sustainable aviation. At the 54th Paris Air Show on June 21, 2023, the airline signed a Memorandum of Understanding with AURA AERO, a French aircraft manufacturer, for the 19-seater ERA, an electric regional aircraft expected to enter commercial service before 2030. [[4]](#cite_note-4)

## Destinations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=AfriJet&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Destinations")]

As of September 2020, Afrijet serves the following destinations:[[5]](#cite_note-5)

| Country | City/Locality | Airport | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Cameroon](/wiki/Cameroon "Cameroon") | [Yaounde](/wiki/Yaounde "Yaounde") | [Yaoundé Nsimalen International Airport](/wiki/Yaound%C3%A9_Nsimalen_International_Airport "Yaoundé Nsimalen International Airport") |  |
| [Gabon](/wiki/Gabon "Gabon") | [Franceville](/wiki/Franceville "Franceville") | [M'Vengue El Hadj Omar Bongo Ondimba International Airport](/wiki/M%27Vengue_El_Hadj_Omar_Bongo_Ondimba_International_Airport "M'Vengue El Hadj Omar Bongo Ondimba International Airport") |  |
| [Libreville](/wiki/Libreville "Libreville") | [Léon-Mba International Airport](/wiki/L%C3%A9on-Mba_International_Airport "Léon-Mba International Airport") | [Hub](/wiki/Airline_hub "Airline hub") |
| [Port Gentil](/wiki/Port_Gentil "Port Gentil") | [Port-Gentil International Airport](/wiki/Port-Gentil_International_Airport "Port-Gentil International Airport") |  |
| [Republic of the Congo](/wiki/Republic_of_the_Congo "Republic of the Congo") | [Brazzaville](/wiki/Brazzaville "Brazzaville") | [Maya-Maya Airport](/wiki/Maya-Maya_Airport "Maya-Maya Airport") |  |
| [Pointe-Noire](/wiki/Pointe-Noire "Pointe-Noire") | [Pointe Noire Airport](/wiki/Pointe_Noire_Airport "Pointe Noire Airport") |  |
| [São Tomé](/wiki/Sao_Tome "Sao Tome") | [São Tomé](/wiki/Sao_Tome "Sao Tome") | [São Tomé International Airport](/wiki/S%C3%A3o_Tom%C3%A9_International_Airport "São Tomé International Airport") |  |
